title: chrysopogon subtilis
intro: Chrysopogon subtilis, also known as Vetiver grass, is a type of perennial plant native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Vetiver grass include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine practices.
